steps.title: Use the contrast and help
steps.content: Lucia was eager to promote Quechua, but the blank introduces a difficulty with speaking it. Her response was to get pronunciation help from her grandmother and take language classes.

steps.title: Reject words that remove the problem
steps.content: A and C describe someone already ready or skilled, which would not explain needing basic help and classes. D repeats her eagerness but does not explain the challenge. The answer is B.
